svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"><diagram name="DiscoveryPolicy pipeline" id="discovery-pipeline"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="600" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="0" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="760" pageHeight="470" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="title" value="DiscoveryPolicy pipeline" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1A1A2E;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="14" width="720" height="24" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="subtitle" value="queries -> signals -> ranking -> discoveredImages -> CachedImageSet -> CachedImage -> pull pods" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="38" width="720" height="16" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="h1" value="STAGE 1 - queries" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#8A8F99;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="64" width="152" height="18" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="h2" value="STAGE 2 - signals" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#8A8F99;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="208" y="64" width="160" height="18" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="h3" value="STAGE 3 - ranking" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#8A8F99;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="396" y="64" width="160" height="18" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="h4" value="materialization" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#8A8F99;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="584" y="64" width="160" height="18" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="q1" value="prometheus query
range/instant image samples" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAEEFD;strokeColor=#4361EE;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="100" width="152" height="48" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="q2" value="loki query
pull events / durations" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAEEFD;strokeColor=#4361EE;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="162" width="152" height="48" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="q3" value="registry query
repo tags -> image refs" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EAEEFD;strokeColor=#4361EE;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="224" width="152" height="48" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="s1" value="aggregate" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1E7F8;strokeColor=#7209B7;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="208" y="94" width="160" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="s2" value="timeWeightedAggregate" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1E7F8;strokeColor=#7209B7;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="208" y="148" width="160" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="s3" value="windowAggregate" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1E7F8;strokeColor=#7209B7;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="208" y="202" width="160" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="s4" value="eventPullTime
requires loki events" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1E7F8;strokeColor=#7209B7;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="208" y="256" width="160" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="r1" value="signal
scalar: signal: name" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBE6EE;strokeColor=#D81159;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="396" y="118" width="160" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="r2" value="weightedSum
terms: signal + weight" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBE6EE;strokeColor=#D81159;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="396" y="174" width="160" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="r3" value="modelExposure
pre/target/pull-time signals" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBE6EE;strokeColor=#D81159;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="396" y="230" width="160" height="44" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="m1" value="status.discoveredImages
image + rank + finalScore" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDEDF1;strokeColor=#1A1A2E;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="584" y="108" width="160" height="62" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="m2" value="CachedImageSet
reads discoveryPolicyRef" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E4F2EB;strokeColor=#0B7A4B;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="584" y="184" width="160" height="52" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="m3" value="CachedImage + pull pods
paced by PullPolicy" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E4F2EB;strokeColor=#0B7A4B;fontColor=#1A1A2E;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="584" y="250" width="160" height="52" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="footer" value="ranked discoveredImages are consumed by CachedImageSet and materialized as CachedImage pull targets" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#E3E3EE;fontColor=#666666;fontSize=10;arcSize=16;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="20" y="338" width="724" height="40" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
svg.text: queries -> signals -> ranking -> discoveredImages -> CachedImageSet -> CachedImage -> pull pods
ranked discoveredImages are consumed by CachedImageSet and materialized as CachedImage pull targets
